case_title: CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. MARLON MONTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,080.00 FILED BY CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MONTON, MARLON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER OF CONTINUANCE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
